title: CVE-2026-4543 - Wavlink WL-WN578W2 POST Request firewall.cgi command injection

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-4543 - Wavlink WL-WN578W2 POST Request firewall.cgi
